@graph.name: Full Stack Web Development — Rakesh Kumar Sahani

mainEntity.name: What technologies does Rakesh Kumar Sahani use?

acceptedAnswer.text: React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, NestJS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React Native, Docker, Coolify, Cloudflare, WordPress, and headless CMS platforms.

mainEntity.name: Is Rakesh available for freelance or full-time work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — open to full-time, contract, and freelance work. Based in Kathmandu with remote, hybrid, and on-site options across Nepal and international clients.

mainEntity.name: How many years of experience does Rakesh have?

acceptedAnswer.text: 3+ years of professional full-stack development — from MERN web apps and APIs to production deployments, working with startups, agencies, and product teams.

mainEntity.name: What types of projects has Rakesh built?

acceptedAnswer.text: Education portals, medical and hospital sites, sports league platforms, restaurant and hospitality websites, SaaS dashboards, admin panels, and full MERN stack web applications.

mainEntity.name: What is Rakesh's typical project workflow?

acceptedAnswer.text: Scope and requirements, architecture and milestones, iterative build with check-ins, testing, deploy to staging or production, and handoff with documentation.

mainEntity.name: How long does a typical project take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Depends on scope: landing pages often 1–2 weeks, MVPs commonly 4–8+ weeks, larger platforms delivered in phases. Timeline is shared after goals and features are clear.

mainEntity.name: Can Rakesh work on an existing codebase?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — audits, bug fixes, new features, performance and SEO improvements, refactors, and team support on React, Node, and MERN stacks, not only new builds.

mainEntity.name: Does Rakesh handle deployment and DevOps?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — Docker, Coolify, Cloudflare, environment setup, production deployments, and basic performance tuning.
Yes — cross-platform apps with React Native, plus responsive web and APIs from the same stack.

mainEntity.name: Does Rakesh work with international clients?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes — remote collaboration with async updates and scheduled calls, English communication, and milestone-based delivery.

mainEntity.name: What should I include in my first message to Rakesh?

acceptedAnswer.text: Role or project type, goals, must-have features, timeline, budget range for contract work, and links to designs or repos if available.
